name: fractal
description: Cognitive Fractal gives Codex agents project navigation and semantic memory through .nav/ notes, live ripgrep lookups, and the nav CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Project navigation and semantic memory for Codex
interface.longDescription: Fractal helps Codex work in existing projects by storing stable semantic context in .nav/, retrieving live code facts with ripgrep, and using nav commands for project scope, references, briefs, captures, and verification.
defaultPrompt: 接入 Fractal 项目导航
用 nav scope 先看影响面
检查这个项目的 .nav 记忆
